title: leptocercus
intro: Leptocercus, also known as the lizard tail plant, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of leptocercus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various ways to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
intro_study: According to "Andrologia", leptocercus (presumably referring to Lepidium meyenii) benefits include increasing sperm concentration when combined with Tribulus terrestris at certain doses.
